variants.title: Fleetguard AF25259 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P536732
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25259 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P536732
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25259 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Radialseal, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 99.9%, Outer Diameter: 183.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 91.0 mm, Length: 270.4 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Donaldson P536732 Air Primary, Radialseal
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P536732 Air Primary, Radialseal is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Radialseal, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 99.9%, Outer Diameter: 183.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 91.0 mm, Length: 270.4 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%, Media Type: Cellulose
